applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的，应认定为重复报销风险。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: Both R000020 (expense_date 2025-01-05) and R004203 (expense_date 2025-04-10) occurred after the 2025 policy effective date of 2025-01-01.

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed effective 2025-01-01 by Article 14 of the 2025 policy. Both audited records occurred in 2025, after the repeal date.
